title: Hello Knockback!
description: Send your friends and family to the 19th dimension
body:
# Hello Knockback!

With this mod, you can send your friends and family to the\
distant 19th dimention! This mod packs a bunch more funny\
items that will definitely make you laugh everytime you use\
one of them!

[Discord Server](https://discord.gg/qcWSwnNgMX)

## Why?!?
I don't know, this is my first mod. Just some ideas by me\
and my friend Hovan.

## Adds...

- Metal Rod - Weapon, gives slowness II
- Copper armor + items
- Amethyst armor + items
- Speedy Sneakers - Armor piece, gives speed II
- Knife - 6.5 hp damage (3.25 hearts)
- Radioactive Block - 70% chance of blowing up on place
- Uranium - Can be found in dungeons, poisonous
- Nuke Block - Power 10 Explosion
- Lucky Block - 12 different outcomes
- Attractor Block - Attracts items, Needs redstone
- Repeller Block - Repels items, Needs redstone
- Ghost Plank Block - No collision oak plank
- Bouncier Block - Bouncier than Slime
- Spike - Crashes your game if in survival
- Crate - Does nothing, wood
- Ramp - A triangle block
- Portals (A, B) - Teleports to nearest within 10 block Portal B
  from the Portal A by rightclicking it
- Air Leggings - Enables flying in survival
- Freezer Wand - Freezes blocks in a 200 block radius
- Gravity Switcher - Switches gravity for player (Very Buggy, Not Craftable)
- `/lucky_block <outcome>` - Run single outcome of Lucky Block
- Gamerule numberTntLuckyBlock - Number of TNT spawned for outcome 7
- Gamerule anvilRainSize - Anvil Rain Size for outcome 12
- More to come!

I plan on adding a lot of modifications just like the\
old days when mods used to add bazillions of items and\
blocks.
